# Arnav Goel

Arnav Goel is a Computer Science undergraduate at the National University of Singapore, graduating in May 2027. He works across product thinking, applied AI, spatial computing, accessibility, and software engineering, with a focus on building thoughtful products from 0 to 1 and technology for good.

## Canonical pages

- [Portfolio](https://arnav-goel.com/): Selected work, project summaries, implementation details, and outcomes.
- [About](https://arnav-goel.com/about): Experience, skills, education context, and contact links.

## Selected work

- Amble: A live 3D Singapore discovery platform for events, restaurants, landmarks, offers, and itinerary planning.
- SupplyCue: A Telegram first F&B procurement workflow connecting requests, supplier communication, invoice checks, and Owner approvals.
- On-Device Low Vision Assistant: An in-progress iPhone assistant exploring private, accessible guidance for everyday tasks.
- TRIBE v2 Music Optimization: A model-guided music production pipeline using predicted cortical responses to optimize toward a sleep-alignment objective.
- Vision Pro Hand Dexterity Assessment: A patent-pending Apple Vision Pro assessment being evaluated with NUH for stroke rehabilitation research.
